ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: TO AWARD THE APPROVED CLASS JUSTIFICATION AND APPROVAL FOR OTHER THAN FULL AND OPEN COMPETITION (J&A), DATED 4 FEBRUARY 2020. THIS J&A APPROVES AN EXTENSION OF THE BASE CONTRACT FOR UP TO 15 MONTHS. THIS AWARD IS FOR THE INITIAL 12 MONTHS.
